# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
  components:
    pilot:
      enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        env:
          ISTIO_META_UNPRIVILEGED_POD: "true"
          ISTIO_META_DNS_CAPTURE: "false"
          ISTIO_META_INTERCEPTION_MODE: "REDIRECT"
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      rewriteAppHTTPProbe: true
    proxy:
      accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
      adminPort: 15000
      privileged: true
  unvalidatedValues:
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectedAnnotations:
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "*"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "*"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: "15000"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "15000"
